title: Smart Choice Pet Feeder Bowl Bone Shape Fun Puzzle Treat Slow Feeding Interactive Game Dog Training Rewards Hide & Seek
features: FANTASTIC INTERACTIVE GAME: Great interactive game for dogs - perfect for pet bonding! Keeps your dog challenged and entertained by hiding treats under the cups!

KEEPS YOUR PUP HAPPY: Keeps your pup playing longer, eating slower. The change of pace in eating can avoid your dog from becoming bloated and also avoids choking. The “hide & seek” concept of the game encourages natural hunting behaviour and for your dog to use their senses.

GREAT FUN FOR YOUR DOG: Great dog brain teaser, it’s fun to watch your dog work out how to get to the treats. Bring out the genius in your dog with our interactive, treat-seeking puzzles and exercise toys.
EASY TO CLEAN & STORE: Simply lift up the puzzle pieces and wipe clean & small enough to store out of the way when your dog isn't using it.
Suitable for all ages and sized dogs only – This is not a children’s toy.
description: Product Description Interactive Connectable Pet Puzzle Challenge you dog with this connectable pet puzzle. Increase the difficulty level of this interactive toy by adding additional puzzles, keeping your dog entertained for even longer! Colourful Spinning Pet Puzzle This interactive puzzle game features an innovative design with a white plastic base, five colourful, round compartments to hide the treats with spinning lids. This colourful puzzle provides hours of entertainment for your dog! Rotating Pet Puzzle This rotating puzzle for dogs is a fun interactive treat seeking game, encouraging your dogs natural foraging instinct and stimulating their senses. Sliding Pet Puzzle Available in blue and grey, this sliding pet puzzle is a great way to improve your dogs cognitive function and encourage challenging play. Bone Shaped Pet Puzzle This bone shaped puzzle is a great interactive game for dogs - perfect for pet bonding! Keeps your dog challenged and entertained by hiding treats under the cups! Paw Shaped Sliding Puzzle Ideal for younger dogs and puppies, this paw shaped sliding puzzle helps cognitive development and keeps your furry friend entertained for hours. Available in blue and yellow. Paw Shaped Pet Puzzle This paw shaped pet puzzle is a great dog brain teaser,. Bring out the genius in your pup with our interactive, treat-seeking puzzles and exercise toys. Round Sliding Pet Puzzle Ideal for younger dogs and puppies, this round sliding puzzle helps cognitive development and keeps your furry friend entertained for hours. Available in blue and yellow. DIGESTION: A common problem for any dog is that they tend to eat extremely fast which often leads to poorly puppies and indigestion. Puzzles can be exceptional way to slow your pet down to avoid problems down the line. BRAIN FUNCTION: As we age it’s important to exercise our brains in order to stave off issues like memory loss. Evidence has shown that the same is true for ageing dogs. Food puzzles are a great way to keep them thinking and problem solving as they head into their senior years – kind of like Mental Floss for dogs.
